reasoning: The document displays significant visual and structural issues, specifically the fragmentation of a single-page resolution into redundant sections and the complete duplication of the body text. While programmatic word count ratios appear normal, the low visual fidelity score (0.5) and the reported 'inverted reconstruction' suggest a failure in creating a cohesive, professional HTML representation of the source document.

concerns.analysis: The source document is a single, cohesive page resolution. The HTML output significantly disrupts this visual organization by fragmenting the content into multiple redundant sections: a plain text block, a 'Signatures' table, a separate county seal image, an image snippet of signatures, and finally a large high-contrast/inverted reconstruction of the entire document. This layout is confusing and does not maintain the visual flow or intent of the original formal document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: A single-page formal resolution with a unified layout containing header text, a seal, body text, and a signature block.
concerns.output_quote: The content is spread across several disparate sections: a text block (lines 4-29), a Signatures table, individual image assets for the seal and signatures, and a final large section repeating the whole document in white text on a black background.

concerns.analysis: The entire body content of the resolution is duplicated. The text from 'RESOLUTION SUPPORTING THE RECLASSIFICATION...' down to the adoption date appears as a plain text block at the top of the HTML page and is then repeated in its entirety within the high-contrast section at the bottom of the page.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The text of the resolution: 'RESOLUTION SUPPORTING THE RECLASSIFICATION OF MITCHELL COUNTY 911 DISPATCHERS... WHEREAS... NOW THEREFORE BE IT RESOLVED... Adopted this the 21st day of February, 2023.'
concerns.output_quote: The text block starting near the top of the screenshot (under the 'MITCHELL COUNTY' header) and the identical content block appearing again within the large black-and-white inverted section at the bottom.
concerns.location: The first text section (lines 4-29) and the final large document block at the bottom of the screenshot.

action_items: Evaluate the necessity of the high-contrast reconstruction and remove if it is a redundant artifact
Consolidate the duplicated text blocks to ensure a single, clean reading order
Restore the visual integrity of the signature and seal sections to match the original document flow
